reviews.review_msg: If every professor were like Steven I wouldn't mind spending my whole life in Uni. Gives great feedback, Cares about the students, Accessible outside the class, and funny. There is a lot of reading in the course which is expected as its a literature course. I would recommend everyone to take this course.

His class was fun and interesting, everyone enjoyed his class ;D tho there are lots of books and short stories to read, midterms and finals were not that hard if you listened in class and read the books. I would say he is the best prof in fic !!! 100/10
LOVE HIS CLASS

The best class I have ever taken and I hate essay writing. Every class felt like I was just hanging out with my cool uncle. He always has a fun story to tell. You need to do lots of reading (two short novels usually plus some short stories) but you can get by by just reading summaries as long as you understand the stories.
Amazing!

He is an amazing professor, I enjoyed every single class. If you have the opportunity you should definetly take his course. If you want a good grade you should read the books and stories before class so that you can participate more during the discussion. Amazing.

Steve is the best professor I've had in my life. You throw any topic at him; he can talk to you about it for hours; his lectures are so interesting, you'd bound to be interested. He is caring and has a lot of stories. Have fun in the class.

Steve is the most cool professor I have ever seen. He is flexible with the deadlines of the submissions, he is very familiar with the students and most importantly he is a very easy grader. You should know very basic english to get an above average grade.

Great professor, but the reading part is quite tedious. I read a few pages of the first book and got bored already. Fortunately you could totally get by reading only plot summaries and analysis. I only read 4 of the short stories in the form of audiobooks during commute and none of the longer books. Wouldn't take this if it's not a requirement tho.

He is a chill and nice person. However, books in this class are boring. He always marks papers by his own strange criteria. I got a B and my GPA went down so his class is not a GPA booster as you could think.
Amazing instructor with the engaging course. He is really caring and helps students to achieve a good grades. Nothing can complain about this instructor! Highly recommend him!
He is caring and patient with his students. Feel free to go to his office hours or mail him asking about the lecture and feedback on your essay. Steve is the best prof I have ever had!
Steve was amazing. I really enjoyed his lectures, very engaging and meaningful. Ps. I admire all people in reviews who get A level grades, good job!
Congratulations, you just made one of the greatest decisions of your life if you chose him as your prof.
Best Prof Ever.
Funny and caring, you will never get bored in his classes. However, this course is a little bit reading extensive, but it will reward you for small details throughout the given stories.
Coolest prof ever!!!!!!!!

Eng115- Even though I got less grade I would take courses with him again. I got less grade coz of the assignment I missed otherwise it was simple B+. Easy exams, in class activity and movies are wonderful.
The best prof ever!
One of the best prof I had
He is a sweetheart. Absolute gem!

I would take any of Steve's classes again if I could. He's an amazing instructor - very engaging and likes to get to know his students. He's really knowledgable and understanding so take the opportunity to discuss anything with him, you won't be disappointed. Pay attention to his lectures, read the books and it's easy A.
Enjoy his classes
An absolute darling!
Very cool instructor.

Steve's lectures are hilarious and it's impossible to fall asleep in his class. He's extremely knowledgable and you can discuss anything with him - I learned more than just English in his class. He's also caring and really wants to get to know his students. I honestly look forward to his class every week. Take his class and you won't regret it.
Very funny, makes every class extremely interesting, tells a lot of things about book. You must read to succeed, that's enough to successfully complete course
Best prof I've had! He is always patient and his classes are interesting and funny. I never felt sleepy on his class!
He is a very good instructor. He is patient and makes you feel comfortable in his lecture. If you find difficulties on writing essays, he can give you helpful advice.
The best language teacher/instructor I have ever met. I learnt lots of things from him. He also provided positive feedback for the paper I wrote before.
Amazing Lecture. Skip Class? You won't pass.
The best prof I've had so far(very serious)! Would definitely take more classes with him!
the book is  tough but he really makes you enjoy reading my best pro 3 love you
Love Steven! Best teacher ever. His classes are super fun enjoy it alot. Do you work, read your books and yoh will pass.
Very good and helpful and kind professor!!! Funny and interesting!!!! You won't feel sleepy on his class!!!!!
Steve is  knowledgeable and makes his class interesting. He has a high level of EQ.
One of the best profs. Really helpful+is ok with extensions of the essay.
best prof i ever hAd , hilarious interesting..fun to be around with.v.helpful

I took his course in FIC, and that was hilarious!!!Steve helped me to improve my english writing skills + you can always ask him about slang (I mean if you r not native speaker xD) and "other" different words. If you need help he will help you as much as he can. Finally, he is a really nice man!
Good sense of humour!

Extraordinarily nice. One of the few TAs who genuinely cares about both the material and his students. Universities really need to start hiring based on quality teaching, and Steve definitely fits the bill. Fun, engaging, able to build a fantastic rapport with students, and very knowledgeable about the subject matter. Love him!

He is super nice, understanding of personal issues that might prevent on time papers. He is fun and entertaining and able to laugh. He loves Tim Horton's, and people who can talk about the material. Loves to allow students to act or discuss material freely, very approachable and my favourite!
A total sweetheart with a great sense of humour.
No Comments
A very helpful instructor.  Passionate about his work, and in the progress of his students.  Humourous, and class is interesting.  Knowledgable, and willing to help through office hours and E-mail.
Helpful, funny, very smart. Kinda cute but older.
